/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++11  -g -O3 -Wall -O3 -Wall  -shared -Wl,-soname,libhkust_pl_ooqp_itf.so -o /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libhkust_pl_ooqp_itf.so CMakeFiles/hkust_pl_ooqp_itf.dir/src/common/solver/ooqp_interface.cc.o CMakeFiles/hkust_pl_ooqp_itf.dir/src/common/solver/qp_solver.cc.o /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpgensparse.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpsparse.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpgondzio.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpbase.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libma27.a -lblas -lgfortran
